# HELP patchmon_servers_total Monitored servers per team.
# TYPE patchmon_servers_total gauge
patchmon_servers_total{team="Alpha"} 2
patchmon_servers_total{team="Beta"} 1
# HELP patchmon_servers_overdue Overdue (non-silenced) servers per team.
# TYPE patchmon_servers_overdue gauge
patchmon_servers_overdue{team="Alpha"} 1
patchmon_servers_overdue{team="Beta"} 0
# HELP patchmon_servers_silenced Currently silenced servers per team.
# TYPE patchmon_servers_silenced gauge
patchmon_servers_silenced{team="Alpha"} 0
patchmon_servers_silenced{team="Beta"} 1
# HELP patchmon_servers_patched_recently Servers patched in the last 30 days, per team.
# TYPE patchmon_servers_patched_recently gauge
patchmon_servers_patched_recently{team="Alpha"} 1
patchmon_servers_patched_recently{team="Beta"} 0
# HELP patchmon_servers_never_checked_in Live servers (any team) that have never reported a patch.
# TYPE patchmon_servers_never_checked_in gauge
patchmon_servers_never_checked_in 1
